name: Jane Smith

clinical_history.entry: Patient presents for routine checkup. No motor symptoms reported. Mentions father was diagnosed with PD at age 72.
First-degree family history flagged. Patient agreed to participate in KeyDx digital screening.

risk_factors: Positive first-degree family history, father diagnosed PD age 72
High daily typing volume (8+ hrs/day), may affect baseline HT norms
Note: Black patients are historically underdiagnosed for PD, interpret with care
